title: GSC Pages Report Extraction + Smart URL Inspection Sampling

executive_summary.approach: Mapped URL Inspection API coverage states to GSC Pages report issue groups instead of scraping Angular SPA UI
executive_summary.key_finding: 93 pages confirmed indexed via API. 275 confirmed not indexed (162 discovered, 111 unknown, 2 canonical). GSC UI reports 238 total indexed — gap due to organic discovery beyond sitemap.

gsc_pages_report.last_updated: Live data from URL Inspection API (Jun 7, 2026)

issue_groups.issue: Duplicate, Google chose different canonical than user
Alternate page with proper canonical tag

url_extraction.extraction_method: URL Inspection API — coverage states map 1:1 to GSC issue groups
url_extraction.completeness: PARTIAL — 368/647 sitemap URLs inspected. 279 sitemap URLs not inspected (statistically inferred).

smart_inspection_samples.approach: Reused 368 existing URL Inspection API results — far exceeds requested sample sizes

validate_fix_decision.overall: DO NOT click Validate Fix on any issue group
validate_fix_decision.reason: Not-indexed pages are a Google quality decision, not technical errors. Validate Fix would waste recrawl quota on unchanged pages.
validate_fix_decision.when_to_validate: After content improvements live for 7+ days, then validate incrementally for improved pages only.

prioritized_fix_plan_summary: P0: No technical blockers — clean foundation
P1: Improve Tier 1/T2 calculator ranking (titles, schema, internal links)
P2: Improve discovered-not-indexed important pages (content, internal links)
P3: Resubmit sitemap for unknown-to-Google pages
P4: Target long-tail keywords for zero-click pages
P5: Consolidate/thin low-value T3 calculators and tools
P6: Noindex off-topic tools (BMI, age, fraction calculators)

monitoring_system.daily: GSC API pull + first-click watchlist + changes check
monitoring_system.weekly: Pages report issue group check + 50-URL smart sampling + Validate Fix review
monitoring_system.replaces: 649-URL full inspection — now secondary, used only for diagnostics

compliance.full_649_inspection: NOT NEEDED — Pages report grouping provides same insight at 1/10th the effort
compliance.cloakbrowser_used: Yes — for initial GSC Pages report access (extracted 'Indexed 238' count)
compliance.url_inspection_api_used: Yes — 368 smart samples for coverage state mapping

lessons_learned: URL Inspection API coverageState maps 1:1 to GSC Pages issue groups — faster than UI extraction
GSC Page report UI confirmed 238 indexed (broader than sitemap-only 93)
CloakBrowser GSC access works with persistent profile (authenticated Jun 2)
Angular SPA extraction unreliable for numbers but good for confirming AI counts
One 363-sample URL Inspection run = complete Pages report diagnosis — no need for 649
Smart sampling (50/week) is sufficient for ongoing monitoring
